+import Foundation
+
+enum TranscriptionLabExperimentError: Error, Equatable {
+    case pipelineBusy
+    case missingAudio
+    case transcriptionFailed
+}
+
+struct TranscriptionLabCleanupExperimentRequest: Equatable, Sendable {
+    let entry: TranscriptionLabEntry
+    let rawTranscription: String
+    let prompt: String
+    let modelID: String
+    let includeScreenContext: Bool
+    let preferredTranscriptionsDraft: String
+    let commonlyMisheardDraft: String
+}
+
+@MainActor
+struct TranscriptionLabEnvironment {
+    let loadSnapshot: @MainActor () -> TranscriptionLabArchiveSnapshot
+    let copyText: @MainActor (String) -> Void
+    let playAudio: @MainActor (TranscriptionLabEntry) throws -> Void
+    let runTranscription: @MainActor (TranscriptionLabEntry, String) async throws -> String
+    let runCleanup: @MainActor (TranscriptionLabCleanupExperimentRequest) async throws -> CleanupResult
+    let showCleanupTranscriptWindow: @MainActor (CleanupTranscriptWindowContent) -> Void
+
+    static let empty = TranscriptionLabEnvironment(
+        loadSnapshot: {
+            .empty
+        },
+        copyText: { _ in },
+        playAudio: { _ in },
+        runTranscription: { _, _ in
+            ""
+        },
+        runCleanup: { _ in
+            CleanupResult(
+                text: "",
+                usedFallback: true,
+                modelDuration: nil,
+                postProcessDuration: nil,
+                diagnosticTranscript: nil
+            )
+        },
+        showCleanupTranscriptWindow: { _ in }
+    )
+}
+
+final class TranscriptionLabExperimentRunner {
+    private let acquirePipeline: () -> Bool
+    private let releasePipeline: () -> Void
+    private let loadArchivedAudio: (TranscriptionLabEntry) throws -> [Float]
+    private let loadSpeechModel: (String) async -> Void
+    private let transcribe: ([Float], String) async -> String?
+    private let runCleanup: (CleanupRequest) async -> CleanupResult
+
+    init(
+        acquirePipeline: @escaping () -> Bool = { true },
+        releasePipeline: @escaping () -> Void = {},
+        loadArchivedAudio: @escaping (TranscriptionLabEntry) throws -> [Float],
+        loadSpeechModel: @escaping (String) async -> Void,
+        transcribe: @escaping ([Float], String) async -> String?,
+        runCleanup: @escaping (CleanupRequest) async -> CleanupResult
+    ) {
+        self.acquirePipeline = acquirePipeline
+        self.releasePipeline = releasePipeline
+        self.loadArchivedAudio = loadArchivedAudio
+        self.loadSpeechModel = loadSpeechModel
+        self.transcribe = transcribe
+        self.runCleanup = runCleanup
+    }
+
+    func rerunTranscription(entry: TranscriptionLabEntry, modelID: String) async throws -> String {
+        guard acquirePipeline() else {
+            throw TranscriptionLabExperimentError.pipelineBusy
+        }
+        defer {
+            releasePipeline()
+        }
+
+        return try await rerunTranscriptionWithoutPipelineLock(entry: entry, modelID: modelID)
+    }
+
+    fileprivate func rerunTranscriptionWithoutPipelineLock(
+        entry: TranscriptionLabEntry,
+        modelID: String
+    ) async throws -> String {
+        let samples = try loadArchivedAudio(entry)
+        guard !samples.isEmpty else {
+            throw TranscriptionLabExperimentError.missingAudio
+        }
+
+        await loadSpeechModel(modelID)
+        guard let transcription = await transcribe(samples, modelID) else {
+            throw TranscriptionLabExperimentError.transcriptionFailed
+        }
+
+        return transcription
+    }
+
+    func rerunCleanup(_ request: TranscriptionLabCleanupExperimentRequest) async throws -> CleanupResult {
+        guard acquirePipeline() else {
+            throw TranscriptionLabExperimentError.pipelineBusy
+        }
+        defer {
+            releasePipeline()
+        }
+
+        return try await rerunCleanupWithoutPipelineLock(request)
+    }
+
+    fileprivate func rerunCleanupWithoutPipelineLock(
+        _ request: TranscriptionLabCleanupExperimentRequest
+    ) async throws -> CleanupResult {
+        let samples = try loadArchivedAudio(request.entry)
+        guard !samples.isEmpty else {
+            throw TranscriptionLabExperimentError.missingAudio
+        }
+
+        return await runCleanup(
+            CleanupRequest(
+                text: request.rawTranscription,
+                cleanupEnabled: true,
+                prompt: request.prompt,
+                modelID: request.modelID,
+                frontmostWindowContextEnabled: request.includeScreenContext,
+                windowContext: request.entry.windowContents?.text,
+                preferredTranscriptionsDraft: request.preferredTranscriptionsDraft,
+                commonlyMisheardDraft: request.commonlyMisheardDraft
+            )
+        )
+    }
+}
+
+final class PipelineLockedTranscriptionLabCoordinator {
+    private let runner: TranscriptionLabExperimentRunner
+    private let acquirePipeline: () -> Bool
+    private let releasePipeline: () -> Void
+    private let preferredSpeechModelID: () -> String
+    private let loadedSpeechModelID: () -> String?
+    private let restorePreferredSpeechModel: (String) async -> Void
+
+    init(
+        runner: TranscriptionLabExperimentRunner,
+        acquirePipeline: @escaping () -> Bool,
+        releasePipeline: @escaping () -> Void,
+        preferredSpeechModelID: @escaping () -> String,
+        loadedSpeechModelID: @escaping () -> String?,
+        restorePreferredSpeechModel: @escaping (String) async -> Void
+    ) {
+        self.runner = runner
+        self.acquirePipeline = acquirePipeline
+        self.releasePipeline = releasePipeline
+        self.preferredSpeechModelID = preferredSpeechModelID
+        self.loadedSpeechModelID = loadedSpeechModelID
+        self.restorePreferredSpeechModel = restorePreferredSpeechModel
+    }
+
+    func rerunTranscription(entry: TranscriptionLabEntry, modelID: String) async throws -> String {
+        guard acquirePipeline() else {
+            throw TranscriptionLabExperimentError.pipelineBusy
+        }
+        defer {
+            releasePipeline()
+        }
+
+        let preferredModelID = preferredSpeechModelID()
+
+        do {
+            let transcription = try await runner.rerunTranscriptionWithoutPipelineLock(entry: entry, modelID: modelID)
+            await restorePreferredSpeechModelIfNeeded(preferredModelID)
+            return transcription
+        } catch {
+            await restorePreferredSpeechModelIfNeeded(preferredModelID)
+            throw error
+        }
+    }
+
+    func rerunCleanup(_ request: TranscriptionLabCleanupExperimentRequest) async throws -> CleanupResult {
+        guard acquirePipeline() else {
+            throw TranscriptionLabExperimentError.pipelineBusy
+        }
+        defer {
+            releasePipeline()
+        }
+
+        return try await runner.rerunCleanupWithoutPipelineLock(request)
+    }
+
+    private func restorePreferredSpeechModelIfNeeded(_ preferredModelID: String) async {
+        guard loadedSpeechModelID() != preferredModelID else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        await restorePreferredSpeechModel(preferredModelID)
+    }
+}

+import CoreGraphics
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class SettingsHistoryViewTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testDiffEngineTokenizesByWhitespaceAndMergesAdjacentSegments() {
+        let segments = HistoryDiffEngine.diff(
+            original: "alpha beta gamma",
+            updated: "alpha delta epsilon gamma"
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            segments.map(\.kind),
+            [.unchanged, .removed, .inserted, .unchanged]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            segments.map(\.text),
+            ["alpha", "beta", "delta epsilon", "gamma"]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            segments.map(\.hasLeadingSpace),
+            [false, true, true, true]
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testDiffEngineRefinesSingleWordReplacementsWhenCharactersOverlap() {
+        let segments = HistoryDiffEngine.diff(original: "color", updated: "colour")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            segments.map(\.kind),
+            [.unchanged, .inserted, .unchanged]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            segments.map(\.text),
+            ["colo", "u", "r"]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(HistoryDiffEngine.reconstructPlainText(from: segments), "colour")
+    }
+
+    func testDiffEnginePreservesWholeWordReplacementWhenNoCharactersOverlap() {
+        let segments = HistoryDiffEngine.diff(original: "cat", updated: "dog")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            segments.map(\.kind),
+            [.removed, .inserted]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            segments.map(\.text),
+            ["cat", "dog"]
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testDiffSegmentEqualityIgnoresSpacingFlag() {
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            HistoryDiffSegment(kind: .inserted, text: "ghost", hasLeadingSpace: false),
+            HistoryDiffSegment(kind: .inserted, text: "ghost", hasLeadingSpace: true)
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testSpeakerFilteringVisualizationModelFormatsFallbackReasonAndWidths() {
+        let model = SpeakerFilteringVisualizationModel(
+            summary: DiarizationSummary(
+                spans: [
+                    DiarizationSpan(speakerID: "A", startTime: 0, endTime: 1, kept: true),
+                    DiarizationSpan(speakerID: "B", startTime: 1, endTime: 5, kept: false)
+                ],
+                mergedKeptSpans: [MergedDiarizationSpan(startTime: 0, endTime: 1)],
+                targetSpeakerID: nil,
+                targetSpeakerDuration: nil,
+                keptAudioDuration: 1.5,
+                usedFallback: true,
+                fallbackReason: .noSpeakerReachedThreshold
+            ),
+            audioDuration: 4
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            model.summaryText,
+            "Fallback used because no speaker reached the selection threshold."
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(model.fallbackText, "no speaker reached the selection threshold")
+        XCTAssertEqual(model.totalDuration, 5, accuracy: 0.0001)
+        XCTAssertEqual(model.width(for: model.summary.spans[0], totalWidth: 10), 3, accuracy: 0.0001)
+        XCTAssertEqual(model.width(for: model.summary.spans[1], totalWidth: 10), 8, accuracy: 0.0001)
+    }
+}

+private final class SettingsShellHistoryEnvironment {

+            diagnosticTranscript: nil
+        )

+    private(set) var cleanupRequests: [CleanupCall] = []
+    private(set) var copiedTexts: [String] = []
+    private(set) var playedEntryIDs: [UUID] = []
+    private(set) var cleanupTranscriptWindowContent: CleanupTranscriptWindowContent?
+
+    init(snapshot: TranscriptionLabArchiveSnapshot = .empty) {
+        self.snapshot = snapshot
+    }
+
+    func makeEnvironment() -> TranscriptionLabEnvironment {
+        TranscriptionLabEnvironment(
+            loadSnapshot: {
+                self.snapshot
+            },
+            copyText: { text in
+                self.copiedTexts.append(text)
+            },
+            playAudio: { entry in
+                self.playedEntryIDs.append(entry.id)
+            },
+            runTranscription: { entry, modelID in
+                self.transcriptionRequests.append((entry.id, modelID))
+                return try self.transcriptionResult.get()
+            },

+                self.cleanupRequests.append(

+                    )
+                )
+                return try self.cleanupResult.get()
+            },
+            showCleanupTranscriptWindow: { content in
+                self.cleanupTranscriptWindowContent = content
+            }
+        )
+    }
